title: Oshi no ko one! Custom GUI Pack
description: Oshi no ko one! Custom GUI Pack
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/CoBiozQ.png) **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack** **so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Oshi no ko one!". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container**. **The palette that I choose is Purple & Pink but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Gray & white or any colors else.** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Images** **Hud** **![](https://i.imgur.com/us8cpI7.png)** **Settings** **![](https://i.imgur.com/fDf4ghb.png)** **Creative Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/8xYw4rr.png)** **Inventory** **![](https://i.imgur.com/RwenftY.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/N0hZZhH.png)** ****Brewing Stand**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/6TQYWDI.png)**** ****Furnace**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/JEYP9oc.png)**** ****Crafting table**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/kIXeVZL.png)**** ****Loom**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/P4OLzEr.png)**** ****Cartography table**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/Ao9VL6I.png)**** ****Shulker Box**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/3segzZT.png)**** ****Beacon Menu**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/F4skOyZ.png)**** ****Villager** ****Trading Menu****** ******![](https://i.imgur.com/tjn9Eg6.png)****** [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) [** ![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
